permissions.label: Read data metadata
permissions.description: View workflow, artifact, schema, evidence, and dataset metadata visible in the workspace.

permissions.label: Profile data
permissions.description: Run non-mutating profiling over submitted healthcare data.

permissions.label: Validate data
permissions.description: Run parser, validation, PHI, format, and quality checks over submitted data.

permissions.label: Draft transformations
permissions.description: Create review-gated workflow or mapping drafts that may transform healthcare data.

permissions.label: Export governed outputs
permissions.description: Export approved workflow outputs and provenance packages.

permissions.label: Search evidence
permissions.description: Search trusted retrieval sources, standards, and evidence packages.

permissions.label: Read reviews
permissions.description: View human review queues, review status, and review metadata.

permissions.label: Create review work
permissions.description: Create or update review-gated tasks and review workflow metadata.

permissions.label: Read audit records
permissions.description: View audit records, assistant tool-call logs, and governance history.

permissions.label: Write audit records
permissions.description: Append system audit records for tools, jobs, and governed operations.

permissions.label: Read settings
permissions.description: View sanitized runtime and workspace settings.

permissions.label: Write settings
permissions.description: Change workspace or runtime settings that affect governed behavior.

permissions.label: Read users and groups
permissions.description: View users, memberships, groups, and role assignments.

permissions.label: Manage users and groups
permissions.description: Manage organization memberships, groups, and role assignments.

permissions.label: Read admin diagnostics
permissions.description: View operational admin diagnostics and policy state.

permissions.label: Administer workspace
permissions.description: Perform high-risk administration that changes workspace behavior.

roles.description: Read-only workspace participant for inspecting workflows, evidence, schemas, and non-sensitive operational status.
notes: Cannot create workflows, mutate reviews, export packages, or change settings.

roles.description: Runs governed workflow operations such as profiling, validation, retrieval, and review-gated transformation drafts.
notes: Write actions remain confirmation-gated and human-review gated.

roles.description: Reviews blocked or low-confidence workflow decisions and can create review follow-up work.
notes: Approval/rejection endpoints remain separate from this role catalog until F121 enforcement.

roles.description: Maintains data quality, schema, terminology, and evidence governance workflows.
notes: Can prepare export packages only after review gates and provenance checks pass.

roles.description: Workspace administrator for membership, settings, policy, and operational governance.
notes: Admin remains subject to audit and explicit confirmation for high-risk actions.

roles.description: Read-only compliance reviewer focused on audit records, provenance, workflow history, and settings visibility.
notes: Cannot create or mutate workflows, reviews, users, settings, or exports.

roles.description: Initial bootstrap role for workspace owners; equivalent to admin for v0 until ownership transfer is formalized.
notes: Created only during default workspace bootstrap.
